prestazioni: Engine: 3.6L Pentastar V6 (ERB) with a custom SRT-derived cold-air intake system from K&N (part #63-1587) paired with a Borla Atak cat-back exhaust (part #140696) featuring 3.5" dual outlets and T-304 stainless steel construction for aggressive tone without drone

Forced induction: Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (82mm, 1.06 A/R turbine housing) with a custom intercooler setup from Mishimoto (part #MMINT-CHER-18) featuring a 2.5" thick core and 3" inlet/outlet piping, paired with a Bosch 0280158101 high-flow fuel pump and ID1000x injectors from Injector Dynamics

Suspension: KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers (part #35231001) with 8-position adjustable rebound and 16-level compression damping, paired with SPC Performance upper control arms (part #81130) for improved camber adjustability and Brembo GT 6-piston front/4-piston rear brake kit (part #09.9455.78) with 400mm rotors up front
estetica: Widebody conversion: Rocket Bunny Jeep Grand Cherokee L kit (part #RB-WB-JGC-L) featuring 3-piece overfenders, custom side skirts, and a rear diffuser with integrated LED lighting, finished in a custom matte Hyper Black paint with gloss black accents
Wheels: Forgestar CF10 22x12" ET15 wheels in a satin black finish with a 5x127 bolt pattern, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (305/35R22) for maximum grip and aggressive stance

Lighting: Diode Dynamics SS3 Pro LED headlight upgrade (part #DD150013) with sequential turn signals, paired with Oracle Lighting LED fog lights (part #5722-007) and a custom LED underglow kit from XKGlow (part #XK-AL-4CH) with Bluetooth control and 16 million color options
